instruction: Fix the color of the blue header bar on this magnifying glass circle icon — it's the wrong shade (muted blue).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/magnifying-glass-circle.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m15.75 15.75-2.489-2.489m0 0a3.375 3.375 0 1 0-4.773-4.773 3.375 3.375 0 0 0 4.774 4.774ZM21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <rect id="bar" fill="#2c70ec" x="16" y="12" width="96" height="6" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/magnifying-glass-circle.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m15.75 15.75-2.489-2.489m0 0a3.375 3.375 0 1 0-4.773-4.773 3.375 3.375 0 0 0 4.774 4.774ZM21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <rect id="bar" fill="#3b82f6" x="16" y="12" width="96" height="6" />
</svg>
